source_jobs.title: Marketing Associate
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUDU:

Hudu is a fast-growing SaaS platform built exclusively for IT professionals and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). We give teams a single, secure, and beautifully simple place to store, organize, and share everything that keeps modern IT environments running: passwords, network documentation, processes, assets, client knowledge, and more. By replacing scattered spreadsheets, outdated wikis, and a dozen disconnected tools with one unified, customizable solution, Hudu helps thousands of IT teams save time, reduce risk, deliver better service, and scale with confidence.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

Hudu is seeking a versatile, hands-on Marketing Associate who can execute across various marketing channels. Rather than focusing purely on high-level strategy, you’ll work to produce tangible outputs daily—creating and refining content, managing social campaigns, assisting with basic design work, and supporting ongoing brand initiatives. The ideal candidate is a self-starter who can handle diverse tasks, pivot quickly, and help enhance our marketing presence.



The essential functions include, but are not limited to the following:

 - Write and refine copy for web pages, case studies, social media posts, and marketing assets

 - Manage social media channels (organic and paid), ensuring consistent posting, community engagement, and aligned branding

 - Produce basic visuals and graphics that fit our established brand aesthetic (e.g., simple social graphics, presentation materials)

 - Support ongoing marketing campaigns, coordinating content needs, tracking performance metrics, and suggesting improvements

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams (designers, developers, leadership) to ensure cohesive messaging and timely execution

 - Gain experience to SEO management, including keyword research, on-page optimization, and performance tracking

 - Support paid ad campaigns across platforms

 - Maintain and organize marketing assets, ensuring brand materials, templates and resources are updated and accessible

 - Foster marketing relationships with partners, vendors, and external collaborators to support campaign execution and brand growth




ABOUT YOU:

 - 1-3 years of experience in a marketing or related role, ideally in a startup or fast-paced environment

 - Someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and eager to learn, grow, and contribute ideas in a collaborative high-energy setting

 - Solid writing skills and the ability to produce compelling, on-brand copy for various channels

 - Ability to leverage AI tools to accelerate content creation, streamline workflows, and improve efficiency

 - Familiarity with social media management (paid and organic) and basic design tools (e.g., Canva, basic Adobe Suite)

 - Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities

 - Comfort working cross-functionally and adapting to evolving requirements

 - Experience with HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar CRM is preferred

 - Familiarity with Figma is preferred

Bonus Points:

 - Bachelor's degree in marketing, or other related field

 - Experience with content management systems or basic HTML/CSS

 - Familiarity with analytics tools (Google Analytics, social platform insights) to measure performance and inform decisions

 - Exposure to broader marketing functions (email marketing, SEO, partner marketing)







WHY WORK AT HUDU:

 - Innovation & Impact : Rapid product evolution with regular feature updates and new tools. Building tools that solve real pain points for users.

 - Customer Focus: High user satisfaction with ease of use, powerful documentation capabilities, and strong product support.

 - Growth Mindset: A high-growth, startup environment where team members can wear many hats, innovate, and grow with the company.

 - Benefits & Perks:
   
   - Health Insurance
   
   - 401k plan with company matching
   
   - Paid time-off
   
   - Flexible work hours
   
   - Work Life Balance

source_jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUDU:

Hudu is a fast-growing SaaS platform built exclusively for IT professionals and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). We give teams a single, secure, and beautifully simple place to store, organize, and share everything that keeps modern IT environments running: passwords, network documentation, processes, assets, client knowledge, and more. By replacing scattered spreadsheets, outdated wikis, and a dozen disconnected tools with one unified, customizable solution, Hudu helps thousands of IT teams save time, reduce risk, deliver better service, and scale with confidence.


ABOUT THE ROLE:

At Hudu, our DevOps Engineers play a critical role in keeping our Ruby on Rails platform running securely, reliably, and efficiently in AWS and Kubernetes environments. This position is ideal for someone who is not only technically strong but also a strong communicator, eager to learn, and comfortable collaborating across teams.



We are looking for self-starters who take initiative, thrive on problem-solving, and are adaptable in a fast-paced SaaS environment. Flexibility is key—our DevOps team sometimes needs to adjust shifts to respond to issues or deployments, and we value individuals who can step in when needed to keep systems stable and customers happy. If you enjoy digging into logs, debugging performance problems, and working across the entire stack—from Rails apps and PostgreSQL to S3, Nginx, and Kubernetes—you’ll have the opportunity to make a direct impact on a growing platform used by thousands of IT professionals worldwide.



The essential functions include, but are not limited to the following:

 - Deploy and manage Ruby on Rails applications in AWS and Kubernetes environments, ensuring high availability, scalability, and resilience across all production and staging systems.

 - Implement and maintain security best practices across the infrastructure, including identity and access management (IAM), encryption at rest and in transit, container security scanning, and patch management.

 - Monitor and analyze application and infrastructure logs (Rails logs, Kubernetes logs, AWS CloudWatch, S3 access logs, Nginx, PostgreSQL, etc.) to proactively identify, investigate, and resolve issues.

 - Debug system performance bottlenecks across the stack, including slow database queries, S3 object storage latency, misconfigured Nginx or load balancers, or Rails application-level issues.

 - Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines that automate build, test, and deployment processes with minimal downtime.

 - Collaborate with developers to improve observability and instrumentation, ensuring that metrics, tracing, and logging are in place to diagnose issues quickly.

 - Conduct infrastructure capacity planning to ensure resources are optimized for cost and performance as customer usage grows.

 - Respond to incidents and outages, participate in root cause analysis, and implement corrective actions to prevent recurrence.

 - Maintain and optimize Kubernetes clusters, ensuring proper resource allocation, autoscaling, and workload distribution.

 - Work with databases (PostgreSQL) to tune queries, configure backups, manage replication, and ensure reliability.

 - Manage and monitor cloud storage systems (S3, EBS, etc.), ensuring secure, performant, and cost-effective use.

 - Implement disaster recovery strategies, including regular testing of backups and failover processes.

 - Stay current on DevOps, Rails, AWS, and Kubernetes practices and technologies, applying them to continuously improve system reliability, security, and performance.




ABOUT YOU:

 - Associates degree required; Bachelor's degree in related field from an accredited college or university preferred; or equivalent education/experience in the computer science field

 - Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a DevOps engineering role

 - Advanced expertise in AWS EC2, Aurora, Postgres, Puma, NGINX, and Kubernetes

 - Experience with Ruby programming language

 - Extensive knowl

source_jobs.title: Integration Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUDU:

Hudu is a fast-growing SaaS platform built exclusively for IT professionals and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). We give teams a single, secure, and beautifully simple place to store, organize, and share everything that keeps modern IT environments running: passwords, network documentation, processes, assets, client knowledge, and more. By replacing scattered spreadsheets, outdated wikis, and a dozen disconnected tools with one unified, customizable solution, Hudu helps thousands of IT teams save time, reduce risk, deliver better service, and scale with confidence.

We're seeking an Integration Engineer to join our core team, focused on building and maintaining the connections between Hudu and the tools MSPs and IT teams already rely on — PSAs, RMMs, and identity providers.

You'll help design, test, and implement integrations that sync company, asset, and ticketing data across systems, while also contributing to our core billing and platform infrastructure for self-hosted and cloud-hosted environments. The primary focus of this role is back-end programming with deep REST API and auth work; front-end experience is also desired.



The essential functions include, but are not limited to the following:

 - Design, build, test, and maintain integrations with third-party platforms (PSAs, RMMs, identity providers) via REST APIs

 - Implement and troubleshoot OAuth and other auth flows across multiple integration partners

 - Design and debug background job processing (Sidekiq) for sync jobs at scale — including diagnosing flaky or slow jobs under real production load

 - Write/test code for back-end operations, monitor architecture performance, troubleshoot and resolve issues

 - Implement new features and integrations, and help improve existing ones

 - Perform systems analysis to maintain and control the use of computer systems software as a systems programmer

 - Revise, repair, or expand existing programs to increase operating efficiency or adapt to new integration partner requirements

 - Consult with managerial, engineering, and technical personnel to clarify program intent, identify problems, and suggest changes

 - Compile and write documentation of program development and revisions, including code comments so others can understand the program

 - Consult with and assist computer operators or system analysts to define and resolve problems in running computer programs
   
   

AI-driven development:

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience using AI coding tools as a core part of your daily development workflow, not occasional or exploratory use

 - Able to speak concretely to how AI tools have changed your workflow: what you use them for, where you trust them, and where you don't

 - Skilled at prompting, reviewing, and correcting AI-generated code; you treat AI output as a first draft that needs scrutiny, not a finished product

 - Experience using AI tools to accelerate integration-specific work: parsing third-party API documentation, generating test fixtures from partner API responses, scaffolding new integration endpoints, or debugging sync issues

 - Track record of adopting new AI-assisted engineering practices as they emerge, rather than sticking to pre-AI habits



About you:

 - Associate's degree required; Bachelor's degree in Computer Science preferred, or equivalent education/experience

 - 4+ years of experience as an Integration Engineer, Backend Engineer, or in a similar software engineering role

 - Strong fundamentals in Ruby and Ruby on Rails

 - Depth working with REST APIs — consuming, integrating, and troubleshooting third-party APIs, not just building them

 - Fluency with OAuth and other authentication/authorization flows

 - Experience designing and maintaining background job systems (Sidekiq or similar), including diagnosing performance issues at scale

 - Advanced experience in PostgreSQL (or similar), Vue/React and JavaScript, and Dockerized environments

 - Extensive experience with Loc

source_jobs.title: Ruby on Rails Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUDU:

Hudu is a fast-growing SaaS platform built exclusively for IT professionals and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). We give teams a single, secure, and beautifully simple place to store, organize, and share everything that keeps modern IT environments running: passwords, network documentation, processes, assets, client knowledge, and more. By replacing scattered spreadsheets, outdated wikis, and a dozen disconnected tools with one unified, customizable solution, Hudu helps thousands of IT teams save time, reduce risk, deliver better service, and scale with confidence.


ABOUT THE ROLE:

Hudu is looking for an eager Full-Stack Ruby on Rails Engineer to join our high-performing engineering team. In this role, you’ll write clean, thoroughly tested code across the entire stack, including building and maintaining RESTful APIs and using Hotwire to develop responsive, modern user interfaces. You will work closely with product, design, and engineering to ship features end-to-end, contribute to code reviews and architecture decisions, and play an active role in improving the performance and reliability of our platform as it grows.

 

The essential functions include, but are not limited to the following:

 - Write clean, maintainable code within the Rails framework, utilizing best practices.

 - Design and optimize RESTful APIs that power our suite of applications, ensuring they are reliable, performant, and consistent across the platform.

 - Integrate Hotwire components like Turbo Streams, Turbo Frames, and Stimulus to achieve smooth, near-instantaneous user interactions on the front-end.

 - Collaborate with UX design and product management teams to brainstorm new and existing requirements

 - Implement new features, new products, and help to improve existing features

 - Consult with managerial, engineering, and technical personnel to clarify program intent, identify problems, and suggest changes.

 - Keep your team up-to-date with your progress, issues, and status



Our Tech Stack

 - Our core web app (Hudu) and Radar (our network discovery product) are built with the latest Ruby on Rails and Hotwire — Radar consists of a Rails front end and Rails backend that communicate with each other

 - The service that runs on customer networks to collect data for Radar is built in Dart

 - Our mobile app, which maintains feature parity with the core web app, is a separate product built with Flutter and Dart

 - We use RSPEC and practice Test Driven Development

 - Our APIs are based on REST and documented with Swagger

 - We use Github for our PR Review Process, and Github Actions for our DevOps Pipeline

 - We use Sentry for error reporting

 - We use Docker to deploy the application in development and production




ABOUT YOU:

 - 4+ years of experience developing software with Ruby on Rails.

 - Strong understanding of Rails conventions within the following areas, ActiveRecord, routing, controllers, service objects, and background jobs.

 - In-depth experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs.

 - Proficient in Hotwire (Stimulus.js and Turbo) for developing dynamic, interactive user interfaces.

 - Bonus points: Experience with Dart and Flutter — this would let you contribute to the Dart-based service within Radar and our Flutter-based mobile app

 - Proficient in modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

 - Proven experience translating UI/UX designs into responsive, user-friendly interfaces.

 - Proficient in Git for version control.

 - Ability to write clean, well-tested, and maintainable code.

 - Collaborative and communicative with a focus on teamwork and problem-solving.

 - Open to constructive feedback and actively participate in code reviews.

 - Excellent time managing skills with the ability to multi-task, prioritize, and meet deadlines effectively.

 - Eager to learn, grow, and ask questions when needed.

 - Excellent communication skills (including English, written and spoken)









WHY WORK AT HUDU:

 - Innov

source_jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUDU:

Hudu is a fast-growing SaaS platform built exclusively for IT professionals and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). We give teams a single, secure, and beautifully simple place to store, organize, and share everything that keeps modern IT environments running: passwords, network documentation, processes, assets, client knowledge, and more. By replacing scattered spreadsheets, outdated wikis, and a dozen disconnected tools with one unified, customizable solution, Hudu helps thousands of IT teams save time, reduce risk, deliver better service, and scale with confidence.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're seeking a versatile Designer to join our team at Hudu to own the user experience (UX) and user interface (UI) of our various digital assets. You will collaborate on the design of our products, breaking down complex ideas, and turning them into simple, elegant, user-centric solutions. We want you to create intuitive, delightful, and seamless experiences for our customers. You will help conduct user research and conduct usability testing to ensure all designs meet user and client requirements, optimize services and products for a range of clients, develop mockups for the design and development teams, and assist sales and marketing with product images for GTM and product campaigns.



The essential functions include, but are not limited to the following:

 - UX Investigation & Optimization: Investigate user experience requirements for our digital suite, comparing existing applications to design higher-performing alternatives.

 - Design System Management: Utilize and maintain our existing component library to build UI elements (navigation, search, widgets). Identify gaps in the library and design new components as needed to ensure scalability.

 - Iterative Prototyping: Rapidly translate product ideas into high-fidelity designs. For every project, provide multiple creative solutions with a clear "Pros vs. Cons" breakdown to facilitate collaborative team decision-making.

 - User Research Execution: Conduct end-to-end user research and testing activities to analyze behavior and validate design decisions (rather than just providing guidance on them).

 - Development Handoff: Prepare clean, well-documented design files to ensure a seamless handoff to the Dev team.

 - Industry Literacy: Maintain a deep understanding of industry trends, best practices, and competitor products to keep our digital assets competitive.

 - Design System Adherence: Work strictly within established design systems to ensure consistency across all platforms, focusing on product-centric typography and layout.




ABOUT YOU:

 - Education: Degree or certification in Product Design, UX/UI Design, Digital Design, or a related field. (Relevant professional experience is equally valued).

 - Experience: Minimum of four years of professional experience in UI/UX or Product Design for digital services.

 - Portfolio: A strong portfolio demonstrating shipped work for both web and mobile applications.

 - Technical Tooling: Expert-level proficiency in Figma. (Experience with Canva is a plus for supporting marketing initiatives, but not required).Flexible and agile understanding of mobile + web best practices

 - Design Agility: A flexible understanding of current mobile and web best practices.

 - Communication: Fluent oral and written English communication skills; ability to articulate design logic to stakeholders.




WHY WORK AT HUDU:

 - Innovation & Impact : Rapid product evolution with regular feature updates and new tools. Building tools that solve real pain points for users.

 - Customer Focus: High user satisfaction with ease of use, powerful documentation capabilities, and strong product support.

 - Growth Mindset: A high-growth, startup environment where team members can wear many hats, innovate, and grow with the company.

 - Benefits & Perks:
   
   - Health Insurance
   
   - 401k plan with company matching
   
   - Paid time-off
   
   - Flexible work

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUDU:

Hudu is a fast-growing SaaS platform built exclusively for IT professionals and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). We give teams a single, secure, and beautifully simple place to store, organize, and share everything that keeps modern IT environments running: passwords, network documentation, processes, assets, client knowledge, and more. By replacing scattered spreadsheets, outdated wikis, and a dozen disconnected tools with one unified, customizable solution, Hudu helps thousands of IT teams save time, reduce risk, deliver better service, and scale with confidence.



About the Role

We're seeking a high-performing Account Executive (AE) to join our team at Hudu and own the full sales cycle—from discovery through close. In this role, you will manage inbound and outbound opportunities, run product demonstrations, and guide prospects through the buying process from discovery to close.



You’ll work closely with marketing, product, and customer success to ensure prospects have a smooth buying experience. The ideal candidate is organized, curious, and energized by new technology—especially AI and how it is transforming modern sales workflows.



We’re looking for someone early in their career who is eager to learn, enjoys experimenting with new tools, and is excited about using AI to improve prospecting, communication, and sales efficiency. If you have a background in the IT or MSP space and are looking to pivot your technical knowledge into a high-growth sales role, we want to talk to you.



The essential functions include, but are not limited to the following:

 - Pipeline Management:
   Manage inbound and self-sourced opportunities through a structured pipeline. Maintain accurate CRM records and ensure opportunities move efficiently through each stage of the sales process.

 - Discovery & Qualification:
   Lead discovery calls to understand prospect workflows, challenges, and goals. Identify how Hudu fits into their documentation and operational processes.

 - Product Demonstrations:
   Deliver tailored product demonstrations that clearly communicate the value of Hudu to MSPs and IT teams.

 - Deal Progression & Closing:
   Prepare proposals, handle common objections, and guide prospects through the decision-making process to close new business.

 - AI-Driven Sales Workflows:
   Actively explore and leverage AI tools to improve prospecting, research, follow-up communication, and sales productivity. Stay informed on emerging AI trends that can enhance the sales process.

 - Cross-Team Collaboration:
   Work closely with marketing, product, and customer success to ensure prospects receive accurate information and a smooth transition from sales to onboarding.

 - Market Awareness:
   Develop a strong understanding of the MSP and IT documentation landscape, including competitive tools and industry trends.



About You

 - Education:
   Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field. (Relevant professional experience is equally valued.)

 - Experience:
   2–4 years of experience in sales, business development, or another customer-facing role. Experience in SaaS or selling to technical buyers is a plus.

 - AI Curiosity & Enthusiasm:
   A strong interest in AI and how it is shaping the future of sales. You actively experiment with new AI tools and are excited to incorporate them into your daily workflow.

 - Sales Tools:
   Familiarity with CRM platforms such as HubSpot or Salesforce is preferred.

 - Communication:
   Strong verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly explain product value to both technical and operational stakeholders.

 - Organization:
   Detail-oriented with strong follow-up habits and the ability to manage multiple opportunities at once.

 - Personality:
   Eager, proactive, and highly coachable, with a genuine interest in technology and a desire to continuously improve your sales craft.




WHY WORK AT HUDU:

 - Innovation & Impact : Rapid pr

notes: Fast-growing SaaS platform with a strong engineering core
